{{Quote|Throw the stones in the bag, Zud, while we finish our rivals and the priest!|One of Zud's partners|<ref name="marvel50" />}}
'''Zud''' was one of a number of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] captured by the [[Red Nebula/Legends|Red Nebula]] [[Red Nebula exiles|exile]] [[Klysk]] and forced to [[Attack on the Red Nebula temple|attempt]] to steal the Nebula's [[Great Life Jewels]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. Although Zud and his two partners managed to reach the inner sanctum of the [[Red Nebula temple|temple]] holding the jewels, they were swiftly dispatched by the [[Red Nebula temple guardian|temple guardian]].<ref name="marvel50" />

==Appearances==
Zud appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 50|''Star Wars'' (1977) 50]], written by [[Archie Goodwin]] and released in [[1981]]. In his lone comic appearance, he was illustrated by [[Al Williamson]].<ref name="marvel50" />
*[[Star Wars (1977) 50|''Star Wars'' (1977) 50]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 50}} {{1st}} {{Flash}}
